ddls:
CREATE TABLE "age_groups" (
  "age_group_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the age group */,
  "age_range" TEXT /* Description of the age range (e.g., 0-9, 10-19) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the age group */,
  "min_age" INTEGER /* Minimum age in the age group */,
  "max_age" INTEGER /* Maximum age in the age group */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("age_group_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "mortality_records" (
  "mortality_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each mortality record */,
  "age_group_id" INTEGER /* ID of the age group associated with the deaths */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* ID of the geographical location */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year when the deaths occurred */,
  "number_of_deaths" INTEGER /* Total number of deaths recorded in that year */,
  "cause_of_death" TEXT /* Cause of death */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of individuals who died */,
  "ethnicity" TEXT /* Ethnicity of individuals who died */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mortality_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_mortality_records_age_group_id FOREIGN KEY ("age_group_id") REFERENCES age_groups ("age_group_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_mortality_records_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "health_interventions" (
  "intervention_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each health intervention */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the intervention */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the intervention was implemented */,
  "target_age_group_id" INTEGER /* ID of the target age group for the intervention */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* ID of the geographical location */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the intervention */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the intervention */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the intervention (e.g., planned, ongoing, completed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("intervention_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_health_interventions_target_age_group_id FOREIGN KEY ("target_age_group_id") REFERENCES age_groups ("age_group_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_health_interventions_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "location_name" TEXT /* Name of the geographical location */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region associated with the location */,
  "coordinates" TEXT /* Geographical coordinates (latitude and longitude) of the location */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the location */,
  "description" TEXT /* A brief description of the location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, healthcare worker, admin) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department or unit the user belongs to */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login timestamp of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the system */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of the access event */,
  "action_type" TEXT /* Type of action performed (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the user accessed the system */,
  "session_id" TEXT /* Unique session identifier for the access event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "demographic_data" (
  "demographic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each demographic record */,
  "age_group_id" INTEGER /* ID of the age group related to the demographic data */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* ID of the geographical location */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender representation in the demographic (e.g., Male, Female) */,
  "ethnicity" TEXT /* Ethnic background of individuals in the demographic */,
  "chronic_conditions" TEXT /* Count of individuals with chronic conditions in the demographic */,
  "health_status" TEXT /* General health status of individuals (e.g., good, fair, poor) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("demographic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_demographic_data_age_group_id FOREIGN KEY ("age_group_id") REFERENCES age_groups ("age_group_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_demographic_data_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reporting_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each reporting metric */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the metric (e.g., mortality rate, incidence rate) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of what the metric represents */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the metric (e.g., per 1,000 population) */,
  "formula" TEXT /* Formula used to calculate the metric */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "health_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the health report */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "generation_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was generated */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the report */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* ID of the geographical location for which the report was generated */,
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* ID of the metric used in the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_health_reports_metric_id FOREIGN KEY ("metric_id") REFERENCES reporting_metrics ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_health_reports_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_health_reports_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "report_access_logs" (
  "access_log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report access log */,
  "report_id" INTEGER /* ID of the report being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the report */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of the access event */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the report was accessed */,
  "session_id" TEXT /* Unique session identifier for the access event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_report_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_report_access_logs_report_id FOREIGN KEY ("report_id") REFERENCES health_reports ("report_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analytics_settings" (
  "setting_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each setting */,
  "setting_name" TEXT /* Name of the analytics setting */,
  "value" TEXT /* Value of the setting */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the data used for analytics */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last updated timestamp of the setting */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("setting_id")
)
